arts.ttl: “I obviously want to play” – Chelsea player not sure he’ll be at Blues next season
arts.sum: Goalkeepers Filip Jørgensen and Mike Penders were both signed by Chelsea in the last summer window. Jørgensen arrived at Stamford Bridge from Villarreal and was included in Enzo Maresca’s plans this season. The Blues took Penders from KRC Genk and immediately sent him back on loan until the end of this season. arts.ttl: Todd Boehly 'contacts' Barcelona duo as Chelsea plan transfer raid
arts.sum: Chelsea co-owner Todd Boehly has contacted Barcelona duo Jules Kounde and Marc Casado over a possible summer move to Stamford Bridge, according to a sensational report in Spain. The former is expected to snub interest from Chelsea in order to remain at Camp Nou for the foreseeable future, however Casado is reportedly tempted by the possibility of joining the five-time Premier League champions later this year.
